title: Meet Your AI Assistant
synopsis: Step inside a story where a new student discovers a school AI assistant and has to figure out when to trust it, when to question it, and when to ignore it entirely. By making real choices alongside the characters, learners build an honest, practical understanding of what ChatGPT and similar tools can and cannot do.
rationale: Middle schoolers are already using AI assistants daily but rarely have structured guidance on how these tools actually function or how to evaluate their outputs critically.
learning_outcome: Students can explain how a large language model generates responses, identify at least three common failure modes, and demonstrate confident, skeptical use of an AI assistant for a real task.
source_signals: Modern-Day Oracles or Bullshit Machines? How to thrive in a ChatGPT world
26% of students ages 13-17 are using ChatGPT to help with homework, study finds
How Students Can Create Notes using BlackBox AI! #shorts #chatgpt #ai #ani #ytshorts
